title: oldenlandia herbacea var. herbacea
intro: Oldenlandia herbacea var. herbacea is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the small mullein or creeping mullein. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Oldenlandia herbacea var. herbacea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the latter two typically being used in herbal preparations for its medicinal properties.
